steps.title: Use Form 4720 percentages
steps.content: The blank concerns organizations that filed Form 990-PF, so the support must come from the graph's breakdown of why those organizations also filed Form 4720.

steps.title: Keep the comparison in scope
steps.content: A compares Form 990-PF filers with Form 990 filers, B requires combining other reasons, and C requires average penalty amounts rather than percentages by filing reason. The relevant statement compares excess business holdings with minimum charitable distribution failure within the Form 990-PF group. The answer is D.
